Merging Cells

Contents

  • Usage
  • Example - Column Span
  • Example - Row Span
  • Example - Row and Column Span

Merging Cells#

Usage#

  • < merge this cell with the one to the left of it.

  • ^ merge this cell with the one above it.

  • Avoid merging body cells and header rows.

Example - Column Span#

Horizontal merge.#

Merged

Unmerged

Unmerged
Example - Column Span Code#
.. rcsv-table:: Horizontal merge.

    Merged,<
    Unmerged, Unmerged

Example - Row Span#

Vertical merge.#

Merged

Unmerged

Unmerged
Example - Row Span Code#
.. rcsv-table:: Vertical merge.

    Merged, Unmerged
    ^, Unmerged

Example - Row and Column Span#

Both.#

Horizontal Merge

Unmerged

Vertical Merge

Vertical Merge

Unmerged

Unmerged
Example - Row and Column Span Code#
.. rcsv-table:: Vertical row merge.

    Merged, <, Unmerged
    Unmerged,Unmerged , Unmerged
    ^,^,Unmerged
